name: Catacomb Extractor
oracle_text:
Deathtouch
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, draw two cards.
flavor_text: "The things down there aren't treasures. They're organs. The dungeon just hasn't noticed they're missing yet."
design_notes: A black uncommon creature at CMC 3 with P+T = 4 (well within budget). Deathtouch makes it a real threat in combat, encouraging blocks or letting it connect. The sacrifice-an-artifact trigger for draw-two rewards the set's artifact subtheme (Salvage tokens, relics) and gives black a payoff for accumulating artifacts without stepping outside the color pie — black sacrifices resources for card advantage. The two abilities work together: deathtouch helps it connect, and connecting lets you cash in artifacts. Clean two-ability uncommon design.
